studies.title: Prospective randomized study on the multimodal self-treatment of psychogenic erectile dysfunction using a digital health application.
studies.brief_summary:
Kranus Edera is a certified digital health app that helps men improve their erectile function. In a previous study (EDDIG), it was shown to be effective in men with physical causes of erectile dysfunction. Since April 2023, it has been officially approved and listed by the German health authority (BfArM).

The new PEDDIG study looks at how well the app works for men whose erection problems are mostly psychological in nature (ICD-10: F52.2). The app offers a combination of training for endurance, pelvic floor, whole-body strength, balance, and relaxation techniques. It also includes helpful tips and support related to sexuality, health, and lifestyle.

All training plans are personalized and become more challenging over time. The goal of the study is to see if the app can significantly improve erectile function in these patients.
